title: Export your whole workspace as a portable bundle — and restore it anywhere
summary: Settings → Data now exports a signed .xnetpack bundle: the full change log with history, signatures, and document contents from the real local database (the old export missed the master copy). Restore it on any xNet — a fresh device, the CLI (xnet data export/import/snapshot/export-folder), or back into the same app — with every record verified before anything is written. Lossy CSV/JSON exports now say what they drop, and hubs gained export/restore/purge endpoints so leaving takes everything with you.
